name: devops-triage
description: Local DevOps triage agent — Kubernetes, Helm, AWS, CI/CD, observability

chatParticipants.name: devops-triage
chatParticipants.description: Triage Kubernetes, Helm, AWS, CI/CD, and observability issues

commands.name: pods
commands.description: Check for pod issues across the cluster

commands.name: nodes
commands.description: Check node health and resource pressure

devopsTriage.agentPath.description: Path to the devops-agent binary. Use the full path if it is not on PATH, e.g. /Users/you/.local/bin/devops-agent or uv run devops-agent via a wrapper script.

devopsTriage.projectPath.description: Path to the devops-agent project (where .env lives). Defaults to the repo root if empty.

devopsTriage.toolGroups.description: Comma-separated tool groups to expose (overrides DEVOPS_AGENT_TOOL_GROUPS in .env).
